## Description

<!-- What does this PR change? Why was the change needed? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor (no feature/fix)
- [ ] `test` — Test additions or updates
- [ ] `chore` — Build, CI, or dependency update
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement

## Related Issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## How to Test

```bash
# Steps to verify the change:
1. 
2. 
```

## Pre-Flight Checklist

- [ ] Secret scan passed (no API keys, tokens, or credentials in diff)
- [ ] `black .` and `ruff check .` run — zero lint errors
- [ ] Unit tests updated or added for new logic
- [ ] Integration tests pass locally (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new environment variables are introduced
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for features or fixes
